paymentSetup.title: Stripe Payments
paymentSetup.secure100Desc: All payments are processed via Stripe, the world leader in online payments.
paymentSetup.lockedDesc: Funds are secured on Stripe and only released to the provider after both parties confirm.
paymentSetup.feesDesc: A €2 commission is added to the mission price to support the platform.
paymentSetup.step1: The requester pays the mission amount + €2 fee via Stripe
paymentSetup.step2: Money is secured on Stripe — no one touches it until the end
paymentSetup.step4: Both parties confirm the mission is complete → funds are released
paymentSetup.step5: The provider receives payment to their Stripe account

help.title: Help & Contact
help.a1: Go to the home page and tap the + button at the bottom right. Fill in the form with the title, description and category of your request. You can also add photos and set a price. Once published, your request will be visible to providers around you.
help.q2: How do I chat with a provider?
help.a2: When a provider is interested in your request, you can click the "Chat" button from the request details. The built-in messaging lets you communicate in real time. After 5 messages exchanged, secure payment becomes available.
help.a3: Payment is locked on our platform until the mission is complete. Once the service is done, you confirm mission completion and funds are released to the provider. If an issue arises, our mediation team can intervene.
help.q4: How do I become a provider?
help.a4: You can apply to become a provider from your account settings. Fill in the form with your skills and experience. Our team will review your application within 48h. Once approved, you can offer your services to requesters.
help.a5: Yes, we offer identity verification via official ID. Verified members display a blue badge. While verification is not mandatory, it is strongly recommended for trust between members.
help.q6: What to do in case of a dispute?
help.a6: In case of disagreement, first contact the other member via messaging to find a solution. If no agreement is reached, write to us at askoo.contact@gmail.com. We review each situation and make a decision within 48h.

privacy.title: Privacy & Legal
privacy.rgpdContent: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to access, rectify and delete your personal data. The information you share (name, email, location) is used solely for platform operation: matching, messaging and payments. We do not sell any data to third parties. You can request deletion of your account and all your data at any time from settings.
privacy.cguContent: By using Askoo, you agree to comply with these terms. The platform serves as an intermediary for connecting requesters and service providers. Each user is responsible for their listings and services. Disputes between members must first be resolved amicably. The Askoo team reserves the right to suspend any account in case of rule violations.
privacy.cookiesContent: We use essential cookies for platform functionality (authentication, user session). Analytical cookies (anonymized) help us improve the experience. You can configure your cookie preferences at any time via your browser settings. No advertising cookies are used on Askoo.
privacy.legalContent: Askoo is a platform for connecting individuals for local services. Published by Askoo SAS, 123 Rue de l'Entraide, 75011 Paris. SIRET: 123 456 789 00012. Publication director: The Askoo team. Hosting: Supabase Inc., 111 Sutter Street, San Francisco, CA 94104.
